title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device permission prompt persists after tapping "Cancel" and re-opening the feature in Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature.
4. When the app requests location permission, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Observe the permission prompt that appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
7. Observe that the app navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu (Home screen).
8. Tap on Find My Device again.
9. Observe that the same permission prompt appears again.
10. Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
11. Navigate to Find My Device again.
expected: After tapping "Don't Allow" and then "Cancel", the user should be returned to the Find My Device screen or the Home screen. Re-opening Find My Device should show the permission prompt again, which is consistent behavior.
